QA-09 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa09 og title present
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa09_og_title_present 2026-06-11 05:01:31 15.01s
What this test was checking
Open Graph og:title should be present (social preview) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Open Graph og:title should be present (social preview).
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
